condition.description: Defines a conditional expression that determines when the IAM policy binding is applied. Constraints include specifying title, description, and expression fields.

env_id.description: ID of the Apigee environment where IAM policy bindings will be applied.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the IAM role will be assigned, such as a user, group, or service account in the format `user:email` or `serviceAccount:email`.

org_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Apigee organization where the IAM policy for the environment is applied.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member within the Apigee environment, such as 'roles/apigee.environmentAdmin'.
